text:
CST_SHR_GRP_CD_09 
CST_SHR_GRP_CD_10 
CST_SHR_GRP_CD_11 
CST_SHR_GRP_CD_12 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 
VALUES: 
00 = Not Medicare enrolled for the 
month 
01 = Beneficiary enrolled in Parts A 
and/or B, and Part D; deemed 
eligible for LIS with 100% premium 
subsidy and no copayment 
02 = Beneficiary enrolled in Parts A 
and/or B, and Part D; deemed 
eligible for LIS with 100% premium 
subsidy and low copayment
